'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 85''' was the eighty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 13]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Founding the New [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]]
*[[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]
*[[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]]
*[[Human replica droid|Human Replica]] and [[Synthdroid]]
*[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|Super Battle Droids]]
*[[Metrocab Robo-Hack Landspeeder|Robo-Hack]]
*[[Homing beacon/Legends|Homing beacons]]
*[[Core ship/Legends|Trade Federation Battleship Core]] Landing Pit
